overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through an industrial complex. The player moves from a narrow walkway between large storage tanks, through metal-grated corridors, and into an open industrial yard dominated by a massive illuminated billboard displaying the number '2'.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway between industrial storage tank and concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow industrial walkway beside the large cylindrical tank with red warning light

entered.detail: large rusted cylindrical industrial tank with corrugated metal surface
small red beacon light mounted on top of the storage tank
metal pipe railing running along the edge of the walkway
tall concrete wall with weathered surface and metal fixtures
network of metal pipes and beams overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow industrial walkway at night, flanked by a massive cylindrical storage tank on the left and a concrete wall on the right. A red warning light blinks atop the distant tank as the camera moves forward steadily through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway with metal grating and safety barriers

events.description: turns right from narrow tank corridor into grated industrial walkway with metal fencing

agents.ego_description: turning right and continuing through a metal-grated industrial corridor with barriers on the right side

entered.detail: tall industrial fence made of horizontal metal bars and grating
red and white striped concrete barriers near the fence
large industrial building with metal siding and small windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a semi-enclosed industrial walkway featuring metal grate fencing on the right and industrial buildings on the left. The path is lined with concrete barriers and overhead metal structures as the movement continues through the complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial service road with large overhead pipelines

events.description: exits enclosed walkway into open industrial yard with visible night sky and distant city lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the open industrial road beneath large overhead pipes with a water tower visible in the distance

entered.detail: massive industrial pipes running parallel to the road on metal support structures
tall cylindrical water tower silhouetted against the night sky
glow of city lights visible on the horizon beyond the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed walkway, the scene opens into a wide industrial yard under the night sky. Large overhead pipelines dominate the view running parallel to the path, while a distant water tower and city lights are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone dominated by large illuminated billboard

events.description: massive illuminated billboard displaying red number 2 comes into view ahead
passes directly underneath the towering billboard structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the massive illuminated billboard while continuing along the overgrown industrial path

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard structure displaying a large red number 2 on white background with spotlights

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a massive illuminated billboard displaying a red '2' that dominates the industrial landscape. The camera approaches this landmark, passes underneath its towering structure, and continues into the open industrial wasteland beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a vast, illuminated wasteland. It begins on a narrow walkway flanked by a massive cylindrical storage tank and a concrete wall, moving steadily forward under the glow of a blinking red warning light. As the camera turns right, the environment shifts into a semi-enclosed path lined with metal grate fencing, concrete barriers, and overhead structures. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the walkway into a wide industrial yard dominated by overhead pipelines and distant city lights on the horizon. Finally, the movement leads toward a massive illuminated billboard displaying a red number 2, passing beneath its towering structure and continuing into the open industrial expanse beyond.
